blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,977 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
